reviews.comment:
Pésima Atención en el día de hoy! llegué 13:15 hs el día de la fecha y sólo había un coche cargando en la isla delante mío. una eternidad hasta que atendieron. Y al intentar cargar,no había diesel 500! así que no me cargaron.lo peor es que la poco comedida playera me mandaba a hacer la fila nuevamente en otra isla.. furioso ,intento irme y no podía salir hacia ninguna parte. y la empleada de Seguridad que colaboraba a esta desorganización. Me intimaba descortesmente a que mueva mi vehículo, pero no se podía, tenía coches atrás y adelante. .perdí casi 20 min . de mi hora de descanso y no pude cargar gasoil...

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service today! I arrived at 1:15 PM and there was only one car filling up at the pump island in front of me. It felt like an eternity before they helped me. And when I tried to fill up, they didn't have any diesel 500! So they wouldn't fill my tank. The worst part is that the rude attendant kept telling me to get in line again at another island. Furious, I tried to leave but couldn't go anywhere. And the security guard, who was contributing to this disorganization, rudely told me to move my vehicle, but I couldn't; there were cars behind and in front of me. I lost almost 20 minutes of my break and couldn't even get diesel...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwbUpTY0lBEAE
